title: The Squid Mod
description: A Mod for the squid lovers out there, I know y'all exist.
body:
# The Squid Mod 
current version: 1.0.0

Have you ever felt like **squids** are boring, and they don't get enough attention? 

Well, this mod adds **squid-themed** things, a totally new set of armor.
As well as a new sword and when right-clicked, will allow you to breathe underwater for 1 minute.

Download the mod and try it out!

_This message was approved by squids_

## Planned Features

- ~~Adding a glow squid armor~~
- more squid food
- Squid Milking?
